title: silky korean egg bowl
description: sweet, silky, comforting korean dish featuring egg and chocolate tempering

ingredients.name: milk
ingredients.notes: dairy or non-dairy milk is fine

ingredients.name: optional toppings
ingredients.notes: toasted chopped nuts, shredded coconut, etc.

instructions: crack 2 eggs into a bowl and whisk them together
add 1 cup granulated sugar, 2 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa powder, and 1 tablespoon unsalted butter to the bowl and whisk until smooth
heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the egg mixture
cook the egg mixture for about 30 seconds, until it starts to set
sprinkle 1 tablespoon all-purpose flour over the egg mixture and stir to combine
cook for another 30 seconds, until the sauce has thickened
add 2 tablespoons milk to the pan and stir to combine
season with 1/4 teaspoon kosher salt and 1/4 teaspoon ground black pepper
transfer the silky egg bowl to a tagliere and top with your choice of optional toppings
